title: carex illota
intro: Carex illota, also known as the Desert Needlegrass, is a perennial grass species found primarily in the western United States. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing. Carex illota can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various ailments.
